title: stelis elatior
intro: Stelis elatior is a flowering plant species in the orchid family, characterized by its unique, epiphytic growth habit and vibrant, yellow-green flowers. Traditionally, Stelis elatior has been used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune system function. In herbal preparations, Stelis elatior is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
